curriculum.descrizione:
Senior Front-end Developer with 10+ years of experience in building scalable and high-performance web applications. Strong expertise in React and TypeScript ecosystems, with a focus on performance optimization, SEO, and modern architectures.
Solid background in data analysis and SQL, with recent hands-on experience in machine learning and data-driven systems using Python.
Certified Professional Scrum Master (PSM I and II), used to working in Agile environments and cross-functional teams.

item.titolo: Web platform for scam reporting and detection
item.descrizione: Web platform for spam email/SMS detection with React/TypeScript frontend and Python ML backend (Naive Bayes). **Technologies**: React, TypeScript, Tanstack Query, SASS, Axios, Auth0, vitest, Python, Flask, scikit-learn, pandas, joblib. [Frontend repository](https://github.com/davidMarabottini/fe-spam-detector) - [Backend repository](https://github.com/davidMarabottini/bayes_spam_detector)

item.titolo: Modular CV Rendering Engine & CI/CD Pipeline
item.descrizione:
Modular XSLT/XSL-FO engine for automated CV generation with multi-language and multi-template support.
Includes CI/CD pipeline for automated document generation and deployment.
[GitHub repository](https://github.com/davidMarabottini/curriculum)

Advanced study of machine learning and data science in Python with predictive model development. **Libraries used**: scikit-learn, imbalanced-learn, pandas, matplotlib, optuna. [GitHub repository](https://github.com/davidMarabottini/studio_data_science).

Optimization and customization of the **Odoo ERP** ecosystem to digitize and streamline business workflows.
* **Low-Code Automation**: Designed and implemented automated actions based on custom prompts to increase operational efficiency. * **Field Service Optimization**: Tailored the "Field Service" module workflow to meet specific business requirements and improve mobile workforce management. * **Business Intelligence & Reporting**: Developed data-driven dashboards using **Power BI** and customized technical document layouts via the **QWeb** (XML-based) engine.
Technical and logistical support and client acquisition for family business

Front-end development for enterprise web portals in banking, media, and retail sectors. Focus on performance, SEO, and React/Next.js architectures within Agile teams.
**Technologies**: Reactjs, Nextjs, Redux/saga/selectors, jest, storybook, AMP, SCSS, Typescript, Material UI, styled components, Recoil. **Methodologies**: Scrum, Kanban, Waterfall **Tools**: Visual Studio Code, Git, Jira, Jenkins.

Front-end development on various management applications in banking and energy sectors within dynamic and often agile environments. **Technologies**: React.js, SCSS, JavaScript **Methodologies**: Scrum **Tools**: Jira, Trello, Git, Gitlab, Visual Studio Code
Development of a portal in PHP5, MySQL, JQuery, Bootstrap for managing black boxes for car fleets. **Technologies**: PHP5, MySQL, JQuery, Bootstrap
Frontend development, procedures, and algorithms for regional public funding application forms. **Technologies**: JavaScript, Oracle V9, Apache FOP
Creation of queries, reports, and layouts in Crystal Report based on SAP document platforms for various clients. **Technologies**: Crystal Report, SQL Server, SAP

Development and monitoring of the “Punti Petalo” startup portal.
**Technologies**: ASP.NET Framework, C#, JavaScript, SQL (MS SQL Server), LINQ, Web services, Visual Studio, Team Foundation, Team Explorer, Google Analytics, Windows Azure
Intensive course on cybersecurity principles, data protection, and digital threat defense.
Advanced training in data analysis, automation, interactive dashboards, and modeling with DAX and Power Query.

item.titolo: Machine Learning and Data Science in Python: Complete Course
item.descrizione: Advanced training in predictive models, ML pipelines, and automated algorithm optimization.
English conversation practice to improve fluency and professional communication.
Engineering studies focused on programming, software architectures, networks, and mathematical foundations.

item.titolo: Technical Diploma in Programming and Accounting
item.descrizione: Technical education in programming, SQL, applied mathematics, and business disciplines.
Conceptual framework for team balance visualization and analysis. [GitHub repository](https://github.com/davidMarabottini/Hypercube_building_framework).

Independent research on mathematical models, algorithms, and pattern analysis, including combinatorial problems and statistical relationships.
Tools used include Python (SymPy), numerical analysis, and algorithm design.

certificates.item: PSM II - Professional Scrum Master II
PSM I - Professional Scrum Master I

competenze.chart-description: Radar chart of skills. Frontend 9 out of 10, ML and DL 8 out of 10, Scrum 8 out of 10, SQL 8 out of 10, Mathematics 7 out of 10.
